<!-- Thanks for contributing to AI Workforce! One app per PR keeps review fast. -->

## What are you adding?

- **App / change:**
- **Department file:** `departments/<name>/README.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] The repo link resolves and is open source with a real license
- [ ] It is self-hostable and shippable in ~a day or less
- [ ] I used the exact app-card format from `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Star count is real (not inflated)
- [ ] "Why it's on the list" is honest about rough edges
- [ ] If industry-specific, I added a pointer in `industries/README.md`
- [ ] No affiliate links or paid placement
